title: HEIHAK 10 Pack 17cm Black Plastic Plant Pots with Saucers and Drainage, Round Medium Plant Pots Flower Pots for Indoor and Outdoor
features: ｢PACKAGE INCLUDES｣ You will get 10 flower pots, each one has an upper calibre of 17cm, lower calibre of 12cm and height of 14.5cm, moderate size, suitable for growing various plants, such as small flowers, succulents, etc.

｢STURDY AND DURABLE｣ Our plastic plant pots are made of high quality PP plastic, lightweight and durable, not easy to deform, pressure and wear-resistant, suitable for long time outdoor use, and can carry the weight of growing plants.

｢PRACTICAL DESIGN｣ Each flower plant pots is designed with a mesh drainage opening at the bottom of the pot, which is convenient for water to flow out, and also effectively prevents plant roots from curling or rotting, creating a good growing environment for plants.

｢WITH LEAK-PROOF TRAY｣ These medium plant pots are equipped with a tray, which can effectively collect excess water and prevent the water or soil in them from spilling out easily, keeping the room tidy and convenient for the plants to fully absorb the water.

｢WIDE APPLICATION｣ These black plastic planters are not only suitable for indoor and outdoor garden planting, but also can be used in various occasions such as office, balcony, courtyard and so on, ideal for your planting and decoration.
description: Product Description 10 Pack 17cm Black Plastic Plant Pots. 10 flower pots, each one has an upper calibre of 17cm, lower calibre of 12cm and height of 14.5cm.
